name: field-fieldset
visual_summary: The field-fieldset component is a visually containerized form section that organizes related input fields. It is typically used to group a subset of fields within a larger form. Developers can utilize this component to improve form clarity and usability.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready fieldset component with the following characteristics:

Name: field-fieldset
Description: The field-fieldset component is a visually containerized form section that organizes related input fields. It is typically used to group a subset of fields within a larger form. Developers can utilize this component to improve form clarity and usability.
Style: minimal
Interactions: clickable
Tags: form, input, fieldset

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
